title: Nurse
biography: Clara Barton was an American nurse who founded the American Red Cross in 1881. During the Civil War, she organized nursing care and supplies for wounded soldiers, earning the nickname 'Angel of the Battlefield.'
aiSummary: Clara Barton is a nursing specialist at American Red Cross. Based in Washington.

timeline.title: Angel of the Battlefield
timeline.description: Organized nursing care and supplies for Union soldiers during the Civil War

timeline.title: Founded the American Red Cross
timeline.description: Established the American branch of the International Red Cross
